text:
(a) In this section, “assembled vehicle” has the meaning assigned by Section 731.001 (Definitions) .

(b) A provision of this chapter does not apply to an assembled vehicle if the provision:

(1) conflicts with Chapter 731 (Assembled Vehicles) or a rule adopted under that chapter; or

(2) is a provision that an assembled vehicle, by its nature, cannot comply with or otherwise meet.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 548. Inspection of Vehicles
##### § 548.009 — Assembled Vehicles

(a) In this section, “assembled vehicle” has the meaning assigned by Section 731.001 (Definitions) .

(b) A provision of this chapter does not apply to an assembled vehicle if the provision:

    (1) conflicts with Chapter 731 (Assembled Vehicles) or a rule adopted under that chapter; or

    (2) is a provision that an assembled vehicle, by its nature, cannot comply with or otherwise meet.

*Added by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1079 (H.B.1755), Sec. 10, eff. September 1, 2019.*

conflicts with Chapter 731 (Assembled Vehicles) or a rule adopted under that chapter; or
is a provision that an assembled vehicle, by its nature, cannot comply with or otherwise meet.
